items.name: Grable & Martin PLLC
items.title: Syndication & Real Estate Attorney
items.description: Massive Capital has a prior working relationship with Legal Team who are well known within Syndication Community for SEC Documentation, Setting up LLC, PPM, OA and Transaction close.

items.name: Cantrell McCullough Inc.
items.title: Property Tax Litigation
items.description: We have working relationship with Property Tax Litigation team, and we are confident to keep tax appraisal basis lower compared to purchase price.

items.name: Banyan Equity Management, LLC
items.title: Property Management
items.description: Banyan is a full-service Property Management company based out of Houston, TX. Banyan delivers hands-on service in multiple Apartment communities mostly in TX but primarily focused on Houston MSA.

items.name: Seth & Alexander
items.title: Certified Public Accountant
items.description: We have been working with Seth & Alexander as CPAs to manage booking keeping, reporting, and taxes for properties and sponsor entity.

items.name: Madison Specs
items.title: Cost Segregation
items.description: We plan to perform a cost segregation study and elect year 1 bonus depreciation for 2024. The year 1 bonus depreciation estimate is ~60%+ of every $100k investment.
